1) Taking prescribed medicines as directed.
2). Regular exercise: Exercise helps reduce stress levels in many ways including reducing anxiety caused from high blood pressure or depression which are common side effects associated with drugs used medically so try incorporating activities such yoga classes into daily routine if possible too!

3.) Maintaining healthy diet; Eating nutrient-rich foods promotes overall well-being while avoiding junk food will help prevent weight gain resulting poorer physical condition down road

4), Get enough sleep at night-time means waking up refreshed tomorrow morning instead being tired throughout day-long periods without restorative power supply within body system itself due lack thereof causing further problems later events during working hours etc.,
5.), Connecting socially supports mental strength – going outside regularly interacting people who share similar interests creates positive energy flow towards self-confidence boosting mood enhancement abilities through various communication channels available online/offline alike!
